title: Gateway won't connect
description: My gateway shows an error or won't connect to the external service.

title: Credits not showing
description: My credit balance seems wrong or credits aren't being added.

title: Plugin not working
description: An installed plugin isn't functioning as expected.

title: Upgrade my plan
description: I need help upgrading my subscription plan or have questions about pricing.

title: Can't access organization
description: I'm unable to join or access my organization workspace.

title: AI responses are slow
description: The AI assistant is taking too long to respond or timing out.

title: Feature request
description: I have an idea for a new feature or improvement.

title: Account / security issue
description: I need help with my account settings, password, or security concern.
